requirements.title: Install and Maintain Network Security Controls
requirements.description: Network security controls (NSCs) restrict inbound and outbound network traffic to only that which is necessary.

requirements.title: Apply Secure Configurations
requirements.description: Malicious individuals use default passwords and settings of vendor-supplied accounts to compromise systems. Secure configurations must be applied to all system components.

requirements.title: Protect Stored Account Data
requirements.description: Protection methods such as encryption, truncation, masking, and hashing are critical components of cardholder data protection.

requirements.title: Protect Cardholder Data with Strong Cryptography During Transmission
requirements.description: Sensitive information must be encrypted during transmission over open, public networks.

requirements.title: Protect All Systems and Networks from Malicious Software
requirements.description: Malicious software (malware) exploits system vulnerabilities after entering the network. Anti-malware solutions must be deployed and maintained.

requirements.title: Develop and Maintain Secure Systems and Software
requirements.description: Security vulnerabilities in systems and applications may allow malicious individuals to gain privileged access. Patching and secure development practices are required.

requirements.title: Restrict Access to System Components and Cardholder Data by Business Need to Know
requirements.description: Ensure that only authorized personnel can access critical data. Implement role-based access controls.

requirements.title: Identify Users and Authenticate Access to System Components
requirements.description: Unique identification of users allows organizations to trace actions. Strong authentication mechanisms must be implemented.

requirements.title: Restrict Physical Access to Cardholder Data
requirements.description: Physical access to cardholder data or systems that hold such data provides the opportunity for individuals to access and remove devices.

requirements.title: Log and Monitor All Access to System Components and Cardholder Data
requirements.description: Logging mechanisms and the ability to track user activities are critical to prevent, detect, or minimize the impact of a data compromise.

requirements.title: Test Security of Systems and Networks Regularly
requirements.description: Vulnerabilities are continuously discovered. Systems, processes, and custom software should be tested frequently to ensure security controls continue to reflect a changing environment.

requirements.title: Support Information Security with Organizational Policies and Programs
requirements.description: A strong security policy sets the security tone for the whole entity and informs personnel of their expected security behaviors.
